ab: muhngeq kahani ga, masa’ kuwing ki iyah i Taytung maskakaru’ ki mama’.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: manaaring cami i Taype’ gumlu cu kulu’ na hapuneq musa’ i Taytung.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: tayhuk cami i Taytung ga, miray na kulu’ muwah autuan cu kulu’ masacka’ cami i mama’.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: ini’ paktatuhi’ cku imuwag ni mama’ ku autuan cu kulu’, miray cu kulu’ ga cupilapilag ru tayhuk la.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: kiya a wahti’ ka sasaanan cu qaqasinu i beh na imuwag ni mama’, maglu cami gumlu na tamayray musa’ i sasaanan cu qaqasinu.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: rasun cami ni mama’ suman cu kating, miyt ru gumlu cu ramayi’ i sasaanan cu qaqasinu.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: gabiyan laru, musa’ cami maneq i naniqan qalang quwis.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: payux a kulu’ i qalang quwis, ru gumlu cami na utubay musa’ kiya.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: mateqru’ maneq papagiyay cami ga, quriqun ku utubay la, asi cami glu cu bas’ musa’ imuwag la.
ch: 吃飽飯要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車回家了。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: tayhuk cami Taype’ kahani la, ini’ baqi kiiy luwan ni mama’ ku utubay la qu?
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有？
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
